steps.observation: Scheduled task executed on FILE-SVR01 via impacket-atexec using Alice's NTLM hash with pass-the-hash, running payload at SYSTEM privilege.
steps.narration: The attacker leverages Alice's stolen NTLM hash to execute a scheduled task on FILE-SVR01 — first lateral hop established.
steps.red_team_reasoning: Alice's NTLM hash is extracted and Alice has admin on FILE-SVR01. FILE-SVR01 has Bob in active session whose hash is not yet extracted. Moving via scheduled task execution.
steps.blue_team: No detection — all 5 conditions met. Scheduled task creation not monitored.

steps.observation: LSASS memory dump successfully captured NTLM hash for active session account Bob on FILE-SVR01.
steps.narration: Credentials harvested from memory — Bob's NTLM hash extracted. The next stepping stone is unlocked.
steps.red_team_reasoning: Bob has an active session on FILE-SVR01 and we need their hash for the next hop to APP-SVR01. We have SYSTEM privilege.
steps.blue_team: LSASS access not blocked — Credential Guard disabled, LSA RunAsPPL not enabled.

steps.observation: Scheduled task executed on APP-SVR01 via impacket-atexec using Bob's NTLM hash with pass-the-hash, running payload at SYSTEM privilege.
steps.narration: Using Bob's stolen credentials, the attacker leaps to APP-SVR01 — penetrating deeper into the server VLAN.
steps.red_team_reasoning: Bob's hash extracted, Bob has admin on APP-SVR01. Charlie has active session there — need that hash for final hop to DC01.
steps.blue_team: No segmentation between corporate LAN and server VLAN. Lateral movement undetected.

steps.observation: LSASS dump successfully captured NTLM hash for Charlie active session on APP-SVR01.
steps.narration: Another memory dump, another credential — Charlie's hash is now in the attacker's arsenal. DC01 is within reach.
steps.red_team_reasoning: Charlie has active session on APP-SVR01 and has admin on DC01. Extracting this hash enables the final hop.
steps.blue_team: Same gap — no Credential Guard, no LSA protection. Credentials exposed.

steps.observation: Scheduled task executed on DC01 via impacket-atexec using Charlie's NTLM hash with pass-the-hash, running command at SYSTEM privilege.
steps.narration: DC01 falls. Charlie's credentials grant the attacker SYSTEM access on the domain controller — the network has been breached.
steps.red_team_reasoning: Charlie's hash extracted, Charlie has admin on DC01. This is the final lateral movement hop. Goal account David has active session on DC01.
steps.blue_team: CRITICAL: No network segmentation blocking server-to-DC traffic. Domain controller reachable from server VLAN.

steps.observation: LSASS dump successfully captured NTLM hash for David which had an active session on DC01.
steps.narration: Domain Admin compromised. David's hash is captured — full domain control achieved. Simulation complete.
steps.red_team_reasoning: David (domain admin service account) has an active session on DC01. Dumping LSASS will capture the goal credential and complete the simulation.
steps.blue_team: Domain admin service account logged into DC01 with exposed LSASS. No tiered admin model.
